name: http-linter
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project @thymian/http-linter --web

generate-docs.command: NODE_ENV=development npx oclif readme --no-aliases --readme-path ../../astro-docs/src/content/docs/references/Plugins/HTTP\ Linter/cli.md --plugin-directory packages/http-linter --tsconfig-path ./tsconfig.lib.json
